title: Ora TNSNames Manager
shortDescription:
⚠️ Oracle client must be installed on your system.
⚙️ Ora TNSNames Manager is a powerful yet simple desktop tool for DBAs and developers to manage, edit, and test Oracle Net configurations with ease—streamlining connectivity, boosting productivity, and reducing errors.
description:
⚠️ Oracle client must be installed on your system.
⚙️ Ora TNSNames Manager is a professional utility designed specifically for Oracle Database administrators (DBAs) and developers.
It provides an intuitive interface for editing and validating tnsnames.ora files, with fast search and filtering, safe backups, and built-in connectivity tests (ping, TCP, tnsping) to simplify Oracle Net configuration and maintenance.
features: 📝 Edit and manage tnsnames.ora with ease
🔎 Fast search, filter, and alias navigation
💻 Dual view: Form builder + Raw editor
Form builder for creating and editing entries safel
One-click connectivity tests: ping, TCP, tnsping
Improved search and filtering of aliases and hosts
Settings for TNS_ADMIN, ORACLE_HOME, and default file
Quick copy of EZCONNECT strings to clipboard
⚠️ Oracle client must be installed on your system.
benefits: Keep technical workflows visible and controlled
Move from task to result with fewer manual steps
Built around edit and manage tnsnames.ora with ease
Built around fast search, filter, and alias navigation
Built around safe CRUD operations with auto-backup
extractedFrom: Microsoft Store publisher search and product detail APIs
